messages.content:
翻译 这里指的是取样以及与滴定试剂反应的时间比较长。
检测时间：30s~4min（不加取样时间）；如果加上离线取样的时间，整个检测过程耗时比较久。（尤其是在工业应用中）

This refers to the relatively long time for sampling and reaction with titration reagent. The detection time is 30 seconds to 4 minutes (excluding sampling time), but the whole process takes longer if offline sampling is added, especially in industrial applications.
翻译 FTIR设备都很复杂：是因为需要提供萃取剂，并且是离线检测；这里的体积比较大是指FTIR光谱仪的体积比较大，例如：JDS-109U型红外分光测油仪，体积是（55×37×18）cm。

FTIR equipment is complex because it requires the use of extraction agents and offline detection. Here, the term "large volume" refers to the relatively large size of the FTIR spectrometer itself, such as the JDS-109U Infrared Spectrometer for Oil Measurement, which has a size of 55 x 37 x 18 cm.
翻译 该检测设备能达到至少100ppm的分辨率
This detection equipment can achieve a resolution of at least 100 ppm.
翻译 指在腔体发生共振时，且共振时谐振腔的工作模式干扰模比较小、腔体Q值比较高。
This refers to when the cavity is in resonance, and the interfering mode is relatively small and the cavity Q value is relatively high during the resonant mode of operation.
翻译  常温下，水的介电常数约为78，油的介电常数为2.3；水的介电常数与油的介电常数的比值为35:1。
At room temperature, the permittivity of water is about 78, and that of oil is 2.3. The ratio of permittivity between water and oil is 35:1.
翻译 之前选用过TE111模，仿真发现微量含水下谐振响应曲线没有TE011模式下的谐振响应曲线尖锐，相较之下，TE011模式下更容易实现高精度检测。

The TE111 mode was previously selected, but simulations showed that the resonance response curve for trace amounts of water was not as sharp as that of the TE011 mode. In comparison, the TE011 mode is more likely to achieve high-precision detection.
翻译 本文中通过实验得到的温度补偿是对整个检测系统的温度补偿，其中包含着介电常数受温度变化的影响以及其他因素受温度变化的影响，其他因素中就包含到热膨胀。

The temperature compensation obtained in this article through experiments is for the entire detection system, which includes the influence of temperature changes on the permittivity as well as other factors affected by temperature changes. Other factors include thermal expansion.
翻译 T2紫铜的热膨胀系数是17.64×〖10〗^(-6)/℃
The coefficient of thermal expansion of T2 copper is 17.64×10^(-6)/℃.
翻译  SBWZ温度变送器PT100，
SBWZ temperature transmitter PT100.
翻译  精度：0.2%FS（FS为0~100℃）；精度为0.2℃
Accuracy: 0.2% FS (FS ranges from 0-100°C); accuracy is 0.2°C.
翻译 在左边输入端接入标准电阻箱(如ZX38/1型和ZX- 25a 型)，其中.上两路为电阻箱的公共端，在输出端串接上标准电流表和24VDC稳压电源。改变信号源发生器(电阻箱),使之等于量程的下限对应阻值，调整调零电位器，使电流表的读数为4mA,改变信号源，使之等于量程的上限对应阻值，调整调满电位器，使电流表的读数为20mA即可。

Connect a standard resistor box (such as ZX38/1 and ZX-25a models) to the input terminal on the left side. The upper two lines are the common terminals of the resistor box, and a standard ammeter and 24VDC regulated power supply are connected in series to the output terminal. Change the signal source generator (resistor box) so that it corresponds to the lower limit resistance value of the range, adjust the zero adjustment potentiometer, and make the reading of the ammeter 4mA. Then, change the signal source to correspond to the upper limit resistance value of the range, adjust the full adjustment potentiometer, and make the reading of the ammeter 20mA.
翻译  油水混合物超声时间为4min,加热速度为0.9℃/min，（例如：夏季，室温在23℃时，经过4min的超声加热，混合物的温度达到26.6℃）。在该装置中，经过超声清洗机超声混合均匀后，将混合物送入谐振腔，静置混合物温度低于25℃，就可以检测，由于腔体材质为金属，散热效果比较好，静置时间随着环境温度影响，冬季散热速度快，夏季散热速度慢；最慢散热时间不会超过2min。

The ultrasonic time for the oil-water mixture is 4 minutes, with a heating speed of 0.9°C/min. For example, in the summer when the room temperature is 23°C, the temperature of the mixed solution reaches 26.6°C after 4 minutes of ultrasonic heating. After uniform mixing by the ultrasonic cleaner in the device, the mixed solution is sent into the resonant cavity for detection when it is allowed to stand still with a temperature below 25°C. Since the cavity material is metal, the heat dissipation effect is relatively good, and the standing time is affected by the ambient temperature. The heat dissipation rate is faster in winter and slower in summer, and the slowest heat dissipation time will not exceed 2 minutes.

翻译 在本文中，是根据谐振响应曲线中的谐振频率偏移量来确定检测样品的含水率，所以对于腔体的损耗没有进行说明。在本文中，主要关注的是谐振响应曲线的极端点对应的谐振频率值。
随着样品中含水率的增大，可以看到谐振响应曲线的损耗变大；由于在实验中，我们发现谐振响应曲线的损耗值不是稳定的，所以我们在本文中主要是通过检测谐振频率来实现含水率的检测。

In this article, the water content of the detection sample is determined based on the resonance frequency offset in the resonance response curve, so the loss of the cavity is not explained. In this article, the focus is mainly on the resonance frequency value corresponding to the extreme points of the resonance response curve. As the water content in the sample increases, the loss of the resonance response curve also increases. However, in the experiment, we found that the loss value of the resonance response curve is not stable, so we mainly detect the water content by detecting the resonance frequency in this article.

翻译  T2紫铜（化学成分：标准：GB/5231-2012）【美标C11000】不是纯铜，还加有少量脱氧元素（铜银合金）铜的铜+银元素含量>99.9%
导电率%ACS：97；电导率为58 MS/m；热导率W/(m.K)：388；热膨胀系数〖10〗^(-6)/K:17.64。

T2 copper (chemical composition: standard: GB/5231-2012) [US standard C11000] is not pure copper and contains a small amount of deoxidized element (copper-silver alloy). The copper plus silver element content is greater than 99.9%. The electrical conductivity is 97% ACS, the electrical conductivity is 58 MS/m, the thermal conductivity is 388 W/(m.K), and the coefficient of thermal expansion is 17.64×10^(-6)/K.
翻译  T2紫铜的导电性能非常好，根据国际电工委员会（IEC）的标准，T2紫铜的电导率为58 MS/m。
T2 copper has excellent electrical conductivity, and according to the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) standard, the electrical conductivity of T2 copper is 58 MS/m.
翻译   指谐振腔的两个端面，本文中在两个端面的外部又加了一段圆柱形管道，是为了模拟在应用中谐振腔是直接与管道连接，模拟电磁场的辐射泄露影响；如果直接对腔体仿真，谐振腔的两个端面是半封闭的，必然会有电磁场的泄露；但在实际应用中，谐振腔是与管道连接的，虽然仍存在腔体外部会有电磁场的泄露，但泄露的电磁场仍在管道中，而不是暴露在空气中。

Refers to the two end faces of the resonant cavity. In this article, a cylindrical pipe is added outside the two end faces of the resonant cavity to simulate the resonance cavity being directly connected to the pipe in application, and to simulate the influence of electromagnetic radiation leakage caused by the radiation of the electromagnetic field. If the cavity is simulated directly, the two end faces of the resonant cavity are semi-enclosed, and there will inevitably be electromagnetic field leakage. However, in practical applications, the resonant cavity is connected to the pipe. Although there is still electromagnetic field leakage outside the cavity, the leaked electromagnetic field remains in the pipe instead of being exposed to the air.
翻译  谐振腔相连的上管道的侧面有一个孔，是直接将温度传感器通过孔放置到管道中。然而温度传感器的探头是穿过管道直接与管道内的油液接触。这样温度传感器检测的温度就是油液的真实温度。

There is a hole on the side of the upper pipe connected to the resonant cavity, which directly places the temperature sensor into the pipe through the hole. However, the probe of the temperature sensor goes directly through the pipe and contacts the oil inside the pipe. Therefore, the temperature detected by the temperature sensor is the actual temperature of the oil.
翻译  油水混合均匀需要4~5 min
It takes 4 to 5 minutes to achieve a homogeneous mixture of oil and water.
翻译  随着时间，我们制作的标准样品会出现油水轻微分离的现象。如果不采取均质化处理，直接倒入谐振腔中进行检测，测量出来的含水率是低于实际值的。当油水轻微分离时，经过超声振动或者乳化，将会让该混合物均匀，不影响检测结果。

Over time, the standard sample we prepare may have slight oil-water separation. If homogenization is not carried out and the mixture is directly poured into the resonant cavity for detection, the measured water content will be lower than the actual value. When the oil and water separate slightly, ultrasonic vibration or emulsification can be used to make the mixture uniform, without affecting the detection results.
翻译 样品测量五次,我们采用加权平均数。
The sample was measured five times, and we used a weighted average.
翻译  在实际应用场景中温度变化是随时的，但在实验室中可以保证一个恒温的室内环境，让温度不变化。

In actual application scenarios, temperature changes occur at any time, but a constant temperature indoor environment can be maintained in the laboratory to ensure that the temperature remains unchanged.
翻译  指的是谐振频率随着含水率的增大而减小这一实验变化规律与理论和仿真得到的分析结论一致。

This refers to the experimental change of the resonance frequency decreasing with the increase of water content, which is consistent with the analysis and conclusions obtained from theoretical and simulated studies.
翻译  理论推导得到：谐振频率会随含水率的增大而减小；仿真得到的图6中也可以得到以上结论；最终我们通过实验也验证了这一规律。

The theoretical derivation shows that the resonance frequency decreases as the water content increases. This conclusion can also be obtained from Figure 6 of the simulation results. Finally, we verified this law through experiments.
翻译  理论是指科学原理解释和公式，仿真是用HFSS根据实际情况构建模型的模拟
Theoretical means the scientific principle explanation and formulas, while simulation is the modeling and emulation based on actual conditions using HFSS.
